title: Flea Treatment in Floral Park, Queens | $350-$650 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional flea treatment services in Floral Park, Queens. Fast, effective flea extermination for homes and apartments. Licensed experts. Call today for $350-$650 service.
intro: Floral Park's beautiful tree-lined streets and family homes deserve to be flea-free. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive flea treatment services throughout this charming Queens neighborhood, protecting your family and pets from infestations. Our proven methods eliminate fleas at every life stage, ensuring your Floral Park home stays comfortable year-round.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of experience serving Floral Park residents with safe, EPA-approved flea treatments that work the first time. Our licensed technicians understand the unique challenges of Queens homes and provide same-day or next-day service with a satisfaction guarantee.
localContext: Floral Park's proximity to parks like Centennial Gardens and the mix of single-family homes and multi-unit buildings near the Nassau County border create ideal conditions for flea activity, especially in pet-friendly households. Our team knows the neighborhood well, from the historic homes near Tulip Avenue to apartments along Jericho Turnpike, and tailors treatments to your specific property type.

faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Floral Park?
faqs.answer: Our flea treatment services in Floral Park range from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your home, severity of infestation, and number of rooms requiring treatment. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take to work?
faqs.answer: You'll notice a significant reduction in flea activity within 24-48 hours of treatment. Complete elimination typically takes 2-3 weeks as our treatment targets adult fleas, larvae, and eggs throughout their life cycle. We include a follow-up visit to ensure total eradication.

faqs.question: Is flea treatment safe for my pets and children?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use pet-safe and child-safe products approved by the EPA. We recommend keeping pets and children away from treated areas for 2-4 hours during application, after which they can safely return. Our technicians provide detailed safety instructions during service.

faqs.question: Do I need to prepare my Floral Park home before flea treatment?
faqs.answer: Yes, preparation ensures maximum effectiveness. We ask that you vacuum carpets thoroughly, wash pet bedding, remove pet toys and food bowls, and keep pets outside or in an untreated area during service. Our team will provide a complete preparation checklist when you book your appointment.
